verses.latin_vulgate: Deus, Deus meus, respice in me : quare me dereliquisti ?  longe a salute mea verba delictorum meorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵלִ֣י אֵ֭לִי לָמָ֣ה עֲזַבְתָּ֑נִי רָח֥וֹק מִֽ֝ישׁוּעָתִ֗י דִּבְרֵ֥י שַׁאֲגָתִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: O God my God, look upon me: why hast thou forsaken me? Far from my salvation are the words of my sins.
verses.finnish_biblia: Davidin Psalmi, edelläveisaajalle, peurasta, jota varhain väijytään. (H22:2) Minun Jumalani, minun Jumalani! miksis minun hylkäsit? minä parun, vaan minun apuni on kaukana.
verses.king_james: My God, my God, why hast thou forsaken me? why art thou so far from helping me, and from the words of my roaring?

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus meus, clamabo per diem, et non exaudies ;  et nocte, et non ad insipientiam mihi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱֽלֹהַ֗י אֶקְרָ֣א י֭וֹמָם וְלֹ֣א תַעֲנֶ֑ה וְ֝לַ֗יְלָה וְֽלֹא־דֻֽמִיָּ֥ה לִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: O my God, I shall cry by day, and thou wilt not hear: and by night, and it shall not be reputed as folly in me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minun Jumalani! päivällä minä huudan, ja et sinä vastaa, ja en yölläkään vaikene.
verses.king_james: O my God, I cry in the daytime, but thou hearest not; and in the night season, and am not silent.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu autem in sancto habitas, laus Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֥ה קָד֑וֹשׁ י֝וֹשֵׁ֗ב תְּהִלּ֥וֹת יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: But thou dwellest in the holy place, the praise of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä olet pyhä, joka asut Israelin kiitoksessa.
verses.king_james: But thou art holy, O thou that inhabitest the praises of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: In te speraverunt patres nostri ;  speraverunt, et liberasti eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּ֭ךָ בָּטְח֣וּ אֲבֹתֵ֑ינוּ בָּ֝טְח֗וּ וַֽתְּפַלְּטֵֽמוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: In thee have our fathers hoped: they have hoped, and thou hast delivered them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Meidän isämme toivoivat sinuun: ja kuin he toivoivat, niin sinä vapahdit heitä.
verses.king_james: Our fathers trusted in thee: they trusted, and thou didst deliver them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ad te clamaverunt, et salvi facti sunt ;  in te speraverunt, et non sunt confusi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵלֶ֣יךָ זָעֲק֣וּ וְנִמְלָ֑טוּ בְּךָ֖ בָטְח֣וּ וְלֹא־בֽוֹשׁוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: They cried to thee, and they were saved: they trusted in thee, and were not confounded.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinua he huusivat, ja vapahdettiin: sinuun he turvasivat, ja ei tulleet häpiään.
verses.king_james: They cried unto thee, and were delivered: they trusted in thee, and were not confounded.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego autem sum vermis, et non homo ;  opprobrium hominum, et abjectio plebis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאָנֹכִ֣י תוֹלַ֣עַת וְלֹא־אִ֑ישׁ חֶרְפַּ֥ת אָ֝דָ֗ם וּבְז֥וּי עָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: But I am a worm, and no man: the reproach of men, and the outcast of the people.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta minä olen mato ja en ihminen, ihmisten pilkka ja kansan ylönkatse.
verses.king_james: But I am a worm, and no man; a reproach of men, and despised of the people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnes videntes me deriserunt me ;  locuti sunt labiis, et moverunt caput.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־רֹ֭אַי יַלְעִ֣גוּ לִ֑י יַפְטִ֥ירוּ בְ֝שָׂפָ֗ה יָנִ֥יעוּ רֹֽאשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: All they that saw me have laughed me to scorn: they have spoken with the lips, and wagged the head.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kaikki, jotka minun näkevät, häpäisevät minua: he vääristelevät huuliansa ja päätänsä vääntelevät.
verses.king_james: All they that see me laugh me to scorn: they shoot out the lip, they shake the head, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Speravit in Domino, eripiat eum :  salvum faciat eum, quoniam vult eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גֹּ֣ל אֶל־יְהֹוָ֣ה יְפַלְּטֵ֑הוּ יַ֝צִּילֵ֗הוּ כִּ֘י־חָ֥פֵֽץ־בּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He hoped in the Lord, let him deliver him: let him save him, seeing he delighteth in him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän valittaa Herralle, hän vapahtakoon hänen: hän auttakoon häntä, jos hän mielistyy häneen.
verses.king_james: He trusted on the Lord that he would deliver him: let him deliver him, seeing he delighted in him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam tu es qui extraxisti me de ventre,  spes mea ab uberibus matris meæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־אַתָּ֣ה גֹחִ֣י מִבָּ֑טֶן מַ֝בְטִיחִ֗י עַל־שְׁדֵ֥י אִמִּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: For thou art he that hast drawn me out of the womb: my hope from the breasts of my mother.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä sinä olet minun vetänyt ulos äitini kohdusta: sinä olit minun turvani, ollessani vielä äitini rinnalla.
verses.king_james: But thou art he that took me out of the womb: thou didst make me hope when I was upon my mother’s breasts.

verses.latin_vulgate: In te projectus sum ex utero ;  de ventre matris meæ Deus meus es tu :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עָ֭לֶיךָ הׇשְׁלַ֣כְתִּי מֵרָ֑חֶם מִבֶּ֥טֶן אִ֝מִּ֗י אֵ֣לִי אָֽתָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: I was cast upon thee from the womb. From my mother's womb thou art my God,
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinun päälles minä olen heitetty äitini kohdusta: sinä olet minun Jumalani hamasta äitini kohdusta.
verses.king_james: I was cast upon thee from the womb: thou art my God from my mother’s belly.

verses.latin_vulgate: ne discesseris a me,  quoniam tribulatio proxima est,  quoniam non est qui adjuvet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַל־תִּרְחַ֣ק מִ֭מֶּנִּי כִּי־צָרָ֣ה קְרוֹבָ֑ה כִּי־אֵ֥ין עוֹזֵֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Depart not from me. For tribulation is very near: for there is none to help me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Älä ole kaukana minusta; sillä ahdistus on läsnä, ja ei ole auttajaa,
verses.king_james: Be not far from me; for trouble is near; for there is none to help.

verses.latin_vulgate: Circumdederunt me vituli multi ;  tauri pingues obsederunt me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: סְ֭בָבוּנִי פָּרִ֣ים רַבִּ֑ים אַבִּירֵ֖י בָשָׁ֣ן כִּתְּרֽוּנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Many calves have surrounded me: fat bulls have besieged me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Suuret mullit ovat minun piirittäneet, lihavat härjät kiertäneet minun ympäri.
verses.king_james: Many bulls have compassed me: strong bulls of Bashan have beset me round.

verses.latin_vulgate: Aperuerunt super me os suum,  sicut leo rapiens et rugiens.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פָּצ֣וּ עָלַ֣י פִּיהֶ֑ם אַ֝רְיֵ֗ה טֹרֵ֥ף וְשֹׁאֵֽג׃
verses.douay_rheims: They have opened their mouths against me, as a lion ravening and roaring.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kitansa avasivat he minua vastaan, niinkuin raateleva ja kiljuva jalopeura.
verses.king_james: They gaped upon me with their mouths, as a ravening and a roaring lion.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sicut aqua effusus sum,  et dispersa sunt omnia ossa mea :  factum est cor meum tamquam cera liquescens in medio ventris mei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כַּמַּ֥יִם נִשְׁפַּכְתִּי֮ וְהִתְפָּֽרְד֗וּ כׇּֽל־עַצְמ֫וֹתָ֥י הָיָ֣ה לִ֭בִּי כַּדּוֹנָ֑ג נָ֝מֵ֗ס בְּת֣וֹךְ מֵעָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: I am poured out like water; and all my bones are scattered. My heart is become like wax melting in the midst of my bowels.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä olen kaadettu ulos niinkuin vesi, ja luuni ovat kaikki hajoitetut: minun sydämeni on niinkuin salattu vedenvaha ruumiissani.
verses.king_james: I am poured out like water, and all my bones are out of joint: my heart is like wax; it is melted in the midst of my bowels.

verses.latin_vulgate: Aruit tamquam testa virtus mea,  et lingua mea adhæsit faucibus meis :  et in pulverem mortis deduxisti me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָ֘בֵ֤שׁ כַּחֶ֨רֶשׂ ׀ כֹּחִ֗י וּ֭לְשׁוֹנִי מֻדְבָּ֣ק מַלְקוֹחָ֑י וְֽלַעֲפַר־מָ֥וֶת תִּשְׁפְּתֵֽנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: My strength is dried up like a potsherd, and my tongue hath cleaved to my jaws: and thou hast brought me down into the dust of death.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minun voimani on kuivettunut niinkuin kruusin muru, ja minun kieleni tarttuu suuni lakeen; ja sinä panet minun kuoleman tomuun.
verses.king_james: My strength is dried up like a potsherd; and my tongue cleaveth to my jaws; and thou hast brought me into the dust of death.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam circumdederunt me canes multi ;  concilium malignantium obsedit me.  Foderunt manus meas et pedes meos ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֥י סְבָב֗וּנִי כְּלָ֫בִ֥ים עֲדַ֣ת מְ֭רֵעִים הִקִּיפ֑וּנִי כָּ֝אֲרִ֗י יָדַ֥י וְרַגְלָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: For many dogs have encompassed me: the council of the malignant hath besieged me. They have dug my hands and feet.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä koirat ovat minun piirittäneet: julmain parvi saartain lävistänyt kuin jalopeura käteni ja jalkani.
verses.king_james: For dogs have compassed me: the assembly of the wicked have inclosed me: they pierced my hands and my feet.

verses.latin_vulgate: dinumeraverunt omnia ossa mea.  Ipsi vero consideraverunt et inspexerunt me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲסַפֵּ֥ר כׇּל־עַצְמוֹתָ֑י הֵ֥מָּה יַ֝בִּ֗יטוּ יִרְאוּ־בִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: They have numbered all my bones. And they have looked and stared upon me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä lukisin kaikki minun luuni; mutta he katselivat ja näkivät ihastuksensa minusta.
verses.king_james: I may tell all my bones: they look and stare upon me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Diviserunt sibi vestimenta mea,  et super vestem meam miserunt sortem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְחַלְּק֣וּ בְגָדַ֣י לָהֶ֑ם וְעַל־לְ֝בוּשִׁ֗י יַפִּ֥ילוּ גוֹרָֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: They parted my garments amongst them; and upon my vesture they cast lots.
verses.finnish_biblia: He jakavat itsellensä minun vaatteeni ja heittävät hameestani arpaa.
verses.king_james: They part my garments among them, and cast lots upon my vesture.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu autem, Domine, ne elongaveris auxilium tuum a me ;  ad defensionem meam conspice.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֣ה יְ֭הֹוָה אַל־תִּרְחָ֑ק אֱ֝יָלוּתִ֗י לְעֶזְרָ֥תִי חֽוּשָׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: But thou, O Lord, remove not thy help to a distance from me; look towards my defence.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta sinä, Herra, älä ole kaukana! minun väkevyyteni, riennä avukseni!
verses.king_james: But be not thou far from me, O Lord: O my strength, haste thee to help me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Erue a framea, Deus, animam meam,  et de manu canis unicam meam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַצִּ֣ילָה מֵחֶ֣רֶב נַפְשִׁ֑י מִיַּד־כֶּ֝֗לֶב יְחִידָתִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Deliver, O God, my soul from the sword: my only one from the hand of the dog.
verses.finnish_biblia: Pelasta minun sieluni miekasta, ja ainokaiseni koirilta.
verses.king_james: Deliver my soul from the sword; my darling from the power of the dog.

verses.latin_vulgate: Salva me ex ore leonis,  et a cornibus unicornium humilitatem meam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ה֭וֹשִׁיעֵנִי מִפִּ֣י אַרְיֵ֑ה וּמִקַּרְנֵ֖י רֵמִ֣ים עֲנִיתָֽנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Save me from the lion's mouth; and my lowness from the horns of the unicorns.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vapahda minua jalopeuran suusta, ja päästä minua yksisarvillisista.
verses.king_james: Save me from the lion’s mouth: for thou hast heard me from the horns of the unicorns.

verses.latin_vulgate: Narrabo nomen tuum fratribus meis ;  in medio ecclesiæ laudabo te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲסַפְּרָ֣ה שִׁמְךָ֣ לְאֶחָ֑י בְּת֖וֹךְ קָהָ֣ל אֲהַלְלֶֽךָּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will declare thy name to my brethren: in the midst of the church will I praise thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä saarnaan sinun nimeäs veljilleni: minä ylistän sinua seurakunnassa.
verses.king_james: I will declare thy name unto my brethren: in the midst of the congregation will I praise thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui timetis Dominum, laudate eum ;  universum semen Jacob, glorificate eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִרְאֵ֤י יְהֹוָ֨ה ׀ הַֽלְל֗וּהוּ כׇּל־זֶ֣רַע יַעֲקֹ֣ב כַּבְּד֑וּהוּ וְג֥וּרוּ מִ֝מֶּ֗נּוּ כׇּל־זֶ֥רַע יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Ye that fear the Lord, praise him: all ye the seed of Jacob, glorify him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ylistäkäät Herraa te, jotka häntä pelkäätte: koko Jakobin siemen kunnioittakoon häntä, ja kavahtakoon häntä kaikki Israelin siemen!
verses.king_james: Ye that fear the Lord, praise him; all ye the seed of Jacob, glorify him; and fear him, all ye the seed of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Timeat eum omne semen Israël,  quoniam non sprevit, neque despexit deprecationem pauperis,  nec avertit faciem suam a me :  et cum clamarem ad eum, exaudivit me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י לֹֽא־בָזָ֨ה וְלֹ֪א שִׁקַּ֡ץ עֱנ֬וּת עָנִ֗י וְלֹא־הִסְתִּ֣יר פָּנָ֣יו מִמֶּ֑נּוּ וּֽבְשַׁוְּע֖וֹ אֵלָ֣יו שָׁמֵֽעַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let all the seed of Israel fear him: because he hath not slighted nor despised the supplication of the poor man. Neither hath he turned away his face from me: and when I cried to him he heard me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä ei hän hyljännyt eikä katsonut ylön köyhän raadollisuutta, eikä kääntänyt kasvojansa hänestä pois; vaan kuin se häntä huusi, kuuli hän sitä.
verses.king_james: For he hath not despised nor abhorred the affliction of the afflicted; neither hath he hid his face from him; but when he cried unto him, he heard.

verses.latin_vulgate: Apud te laus mea in ecclesia magna ;  vota mea reddam in conspectu timentium eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֵ֥אִתְּךָ֗ תְּֽהִלָּ֫תִ֥י בְּקָהָ֥ל רָ֑ב נְדָרַ֥י אֲ֝שַׁלֵּ֗ם נֶ֣גֶד יְרֵאָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: With thee is my praise in a great church: I will pay my vows in the sight of them that fear him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinua minä ylistän suuressa seurakunnassa: minä maksan lupaukseni heidän edessänsä, jotka häntä pelkäävät.
verses.king_james: My praise shall be of thee in the great congregation: I will pay my vows before them that fear him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Edent pauperes, et saturabuntur,  et laudabunt Dominum qui requirunt eum :  vivent corda eorum in sæculum sæculi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֹאכְל֬וּ עֲנָוִ֨ים ׀ וְיִשְׂבָּ֗עוּ יְהַֽלְל֣וּ יְ֭הֹוָה דֹּ֣רְשָׁ֑יו יְחִ֖י לְבַבְכֶ֣ם לָעַֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: The poor shall eat and shall be filled: and they shall praise the Lord that seek him: their hearts shall live for ever and ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Raadolliset syövät ja ravitaan, ja jotka Herraa etsivät, pitää häntä ylistämän: teidän sydämenne pitää elämän ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: The meek shall eat and be satisfied: they shall praise the Lord that seek him: your heart shall live for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reminiscentur et convertentur ad Dominum universi fines terræ ;  et adorabunt in conspectu ejus universæ familiæ gentium :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִזְכְּר֤וּ ׀ וְיָשֻׁ֣בוּ אֶל־יְ֭הֹוָה כׇּל־אַפְסֵי־אָ֑רֶץ וְיִֽשְׁתַּחֲו֥וּ לְ֝פָנֶ֗יךָ כׇּֽל־מִשְׁפְּח֥וֹת גּוֹיִֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: All the ends of the earth shall remember, and shall be converted to the Lord: And all the kindreds of the Gentiles shall adore in his sight.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kaikki maailman ääret muistakaan ja kääntykään Herran tykö, ja kumartakaan sinun edessäs kaikki pakanain sukukunnat.
verses.king_james: All the ends of the world shall remember and turn unto the Lord: and all the kindreds of the nations shall worship before thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: quoniam Domini est regnum,  et ipse dominabitur gentium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י לַ֭יהֹוָה הַמְּלוּכָ֑ה וּ֝מֹשֵׁ֗ל בַּגּוֹיִֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: For the kingdom is the Lord's; and he shall have dominion over the nations.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Herralta on valtakunta, ja hän vallitsee pakanoita.
verses.king_james: For the kingdom is the Lord’s: and he is the governor among the nations.

verses.latin_vulgate: Manducaverunt et adoraverunt omnes pingues terræ ;  in conspectu ejus cadent omnes qui descendunt in terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָכְל֬וּ וַיִּֽשְׁתַּחֲו֨וּ ׀ כׇּֽל־דִּשְׁנֵי־אֶ֗רֶץ לְפָנָ֣יו יִ֭כְרְעוּ כׇּל־יוֹרְדֵ֣י עָפָ֑ר וְ֝נַפְשׁ֗וֹ לֹ֣א חִיָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: All the fat ones of the earth have eaten and have adored: all they that go down to the earth shall fall before him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kaikki lihavat maan päällä pitää syömän ja kumartaman, hänen edessänsä polviansa notkistaman kaikki, jotka tomussa makaavat ja jotka surussansa elävät.
verses.king_james: All they that be fat upon earth shall eat and worship: all they that go down to the dust shall bow before him: and none can keep alive his own soul.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et anima mea illi vivet ;  et semen meum serviet ipsi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֶ֥רַע יַֽעַבְדֶ֑נּוּ יְסֻפַּ֖ר לַֽאדֹנָ֣י לַדּֽוֹר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And to him my soul shall live: and my seed shall serve him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hänen pitää saaman siemenen, joka häntä palvelee: Herrasta pitää ilmoitettaman lasten lapsiin.
verses.king_james: A seed shall serve him; it shall be accounted to the Lord for a generation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Annuntiabitur Domino generatio ventura ;  et annuntiabunt cæli justitiam ejus  populo qui nascetur, quem fecit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָ֭בֹאוּ וְיַגִּ֣ידוּ צִדְקָת֑וֹ לְעַ֥ם נ֝וֹלָ֗ד כִּ֣י עָשָֽׂה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: There shall be declared to the Lord a generation to come: and the heavens shall shew forth his justice to a people that shall be born, which the Lord hath made.
verses.finnish_biblia: He tulevat ja hänen vanhurskauttansa saarnaavat syntyvälle kansalle, että hän sen tekee.
verses.king_james: They shall come, and shall declare his righteousness unto a people that shall be born, that he hath done this.
